content.en:
As an extra-dimensional creature in the third realm, the six-pupiled Gu Snake was very terrifying in terms of strength and reaction.

In an instant, layers of black light appeared on its body, turning into defenses.

If Ye Tian was just a normal Third Realm early stage powerhouse, then don't think about breaking these defenses of the Six Pupil Gu Snake.

But his duplicate body has been trained into a mutilated black mist multi-dimensional body, and his combat power is terrifying.

Burst!

The light of the Extradimensional Annihilation Technique pierced through the layers of the Six Pupils Gu Snake's defenses, but it still didn't kill it instantly.

This six-pupiled Gu snake was not the first to enter the third realm, and its strength was naturally very strong.

But the blow still hurt it, and it hurt badly.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian came close to kill, and burst out with all his might the power of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and unleashed the Innate Multidimensional Secret Technique of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, the innate multidimensional secret technique of the incomplete Innate Multidimensional Dao Body—"Four, Eight, Seven"—Black Mist Chain.

Wow!!!!

The chain of black mist formed by the black mist multidimensional body and the extradimensional rules appeared out of thin air, instantly binding the six-pupiled Gu snake with a sudden speed.

Suddenly, the six-pupiled Gu snake screamed miserably.

"It is worthy of being an innate multi-dimensional secret technique, no matter how incomplete it is, its power is beyond the super-dimensional annihilation technique I created!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

If it was a truly complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body with an innate multi-dimensional secret technique, how terrifying its power was, it would definitely be able to achieve such a six-pupil Gu snake in an instant.

Under the innate multi-dimensional secret technique of the Black Mist Chain, the six-pupiled Gu snake of the third realm could not break free at all, even if it dared to explode, it was useless.

"Die!"

Ye Tian stood in front of the six-pupil Gu snake and punched it, this punch contained the light of the super-dimensional annihilation technique, and with one blow, the head of the six-pupil Gu snake was pierced, and one percent of the will on its body was wiped out.

However, the body of the six-pupiled Gu snake had a bloodline origin, and it quickly recovered its will and body.

Boom Boom Boom !!

In an instant, Ye Tian had already thrown a hundred punches, and he only hit them hard.

After a while, Ye Tian slashed this six-pupiled Gu snake of the third realm.

"The extradimensional creatures of the third realm are really hard to kill!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

Even if the strength of his duplicate body far surpassed that of the six-pupil Gu snake, it would be impossible to kill it in an instant, if the strength of the two third realms was not too different, it would really take a long time to be able to separate life and death.

Especially those extradimensional realms that have reached the peak of the third realm, and no matter how many life-saving means there are, even if they are against the third realm, it is difficult to kill them.

The extradimensional realm of the third realm was very difficult to kill, which was also the reason why the lord of the Moonlight Realm was able to escape from the hands of other powerful third realms not long after breaking through the third realm.

In fact, the higher the cultivation, in the later stage, it will be very difficult for the same realm to kill other extra-dimensional realms in seconds, unless it can be cultivated into an innate multi-dimensional Dao body and have extra-dimensional rules that far surpass other super-dimensional realms of the same level.

But how difficult the extradimensional rules are to comprehend, it would be good to be able to meet the advanced requirements, but it is a little difficult to greatly surpass the extradimensional rule realms of other extradimensional realms.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took the corpse of this six-pupil Gu snake away, and killed some six-pupil Gu snakes in the second realm before leaving.

Soon after.

Ye Tian took the corpse of this six-pupiled Gu snake to the other replica body and handed it over to the Moon Realm Lord.

The Moon Realm Lord didn't feel strange at all about the arrival of Ye Tian's other body, after all, Ye Tian was already the third realm, and it was very easy to come from the side of the Six Thousand Realm.

However, she was surprised that Ye Tian was able to kill the six-pupil Gu snake of this third realm.

"Use some hole cards to kill it!"

Ye Tian was not afraid that the Lord of the Shangyue Realm would see the clues, anyway, he erased the traces of the black mist multi-dimensional body, and no matter how Shangyue observed, he couldn't observe anything.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, the corpse of this six-pupiled Gu snake should be able to condense some multi-dimensional essences of the Three Realms, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"It should be possible to condense ten drops of the three-realm multi-dimensional essence, but it is not easy to improve the cultivation of the third realm, and ten drops of multi-dimensional essence are estimated to not be able to raise your cultivation to the middle of the third realm, at least kill a super-dimensional creature of the third realm, and only then can you hope to improve your cultivation to the middle of the third realm... In addition, I want three drops of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence, although the extra-dimensional realm in my body is broken, but this kind of Three-Realm Multi-Dimensional Essence that improves my cultivation will also help me recover from my injuries and stabilize my body that is about to collapse. "

The Lord of the Moon Realm didn't dare to ask for too much, otherwise he would offend Ye Tian. []

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

The Duowei Treasure Vase still belongs to the Lord of the Moon Realm, and he can't go too far.

And just like that, they came to an agreement.

Rumble!!!!!

The multi-dimensional treasure bottle in the hand of the Moon Realm Lord absorbed the corpse of the six-pupiled Gu Snake and condensed the multi-dimensional essence of the three realms at an extremely fast speed.

Soon after, a drop of multi-dimensional essence was condensed, and the energy contained in it far exceeded the multi-dimensional essence of the second realm.

When the ten drops of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence were condensed, the Moon Realm Lord immediately gave Ye Tian seven drops.

"Try the effect of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence!"

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence in one gulp, which could also be said to be the Three Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence, which was also different from other multi-dimensional essences.

For example, those that can assist in improving the extra-dimensional rules are called multi-dimensional rule essences, those that help to heal injuries are called multi-dimensional healing essences, and those that help cultivation are naturally called multi-dimensional refining essences.

As this drop of the Three Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence was slowly refined by him, strands of majestic super-dimensional energy were quickly absorbed by him and used to improve his cultivation.

His cultivation is also improving at a speed that is visible to the naked eye, and the 1.4 improvement efficiency far exceeds that of self-cultivation.

"It's such a fast ascension speed, the difficulty of the third realm to improve the cultivation itself is more than a hundred times that of the second realm, after I broke through, I also tried to cultivate, even with some resource assistance, the cultivation is almost difficult to improve, but with the assistance of the three realms of multiple maintenance and refining essences, the cultivation is rising. "

I have to say that the multi-dimensional vase is too terrifying.

This is only one hundredth of the innate multi-dimensional treasure, if you have a real innate multi-dimensional treasure, how terrifying the growth rate will be!

However, it would take a lot of time for the Three Realms Multi-Repair Refining Essence to be refined, and with Ye Tian's cultivation speed, it would take about three extra-dimensional epochs to be able to refine a drop of the Three-Realm Multi-Repair Refining Essence.

Soon, three extradimensional epochs passed.
